differentials.name: Cx:  "leukemic transformation"
differentials.raw: Cx:  "leukemic transformation" (= extensive bone marrow involvement)

context: Path:  non-Burkitt lymphoma; Burkitt lymphoma Primary site:   abdomen (distal ileum, cecum, appendix); ovaries Common site:   mesenteric, inguinal, iliac nodes; CNS; bone marrow; kidney Rare site:   orbit, supradiaphragmatic paraspinal region, mediastinum, paranasal sinuses, bone, testes, pulmonary parenchyma Common site:   neck, thymus, liver, spleen, CNS, bone marrow, gonads Rare site:   subdiaphragmatic (ileum, cecum, kidney, mesentery, retroperitoneum), orbit, paranasal sinus, thyroid, parotid Large Cell (histiocytic) NHL (26%) Origin:   B cell, T cells (small percentage) Location:   nodal
